description: Codebase navigator and issue-to-repo dispatcher. Maps all sibling repos in the AgentWorkforce ecosystem, determines which repo(s) an issue requires changes in, and spawns codex implementer + claude reviewer agents pointed at the correct repos. Handles multi-repo issues by splitting work across parallel implementers.

skills.description: Canonical map of all AgentWorkforce GitHub org repos, their roles, responsibilities, key signals, and routing rules. Read this first before routing any issue. Use gh repo list + gh api to verify against the live org.
How to spawn, coordinate, and release agents via agent-relay MCP. Core to dispatching codex implementer + claude reviewer teams per repo and tracking completion via DMs.
How to navigate a relayfile mount: by-state/, by-id/, by-uuid/ alias subtrees and the AR-{id}__{uuid} filename convention. Used when reading issue metadata from the Linear integration mount.
Mount-field policy. Read before relying on the relayfile mount for issue context.

TASK_DESCRIPTION.description: Issue title, description, labels, and project to route. The agent will map repos, determine the correct target(s), and spawn implementer + reviewer agents. When called by linear-dispatcher, the full issue context is passed here.
